chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. High Court Appeal No.418 of 2003 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA 1381/2007. 2. For hearing of CMA 1382/2007. 3. For hearing of CMA 1769/2003. 4. For regular hearing. 05.12.2024. Mr. Shahan Karimi, for appellants. Mr. Shahbakht Pirzada, for respondents alongwith Mr. Muhammad Turhan Khan, advocae...... Both the counsel suggest that by virtue of a Certificate dated 01.4.2013, issued by Securities and Exchange Commission of Pakistan, name of the respondent “Pakistan PTA Limited” has changed its name to “Lottee Pakistan PTA Limited”, available on page 299 of Part-II of the file) and thereafter to “Lottee Chemical Pakistan Limited” (available on page 303 of Part-II of the file). Additionally, appellants’ counsel submitted that on 16.1.2014 the appellants’ name has been changed from “Karachi Electric Supply Corporation” to “K- Electric Limited” (page 293 of the file). Let an amended title be filed during course of the day positively. Both the learned counsel have not disputed to the substance of the order whereby the matter ought to be referred to Arbitrator(s) for adjudication, however, in about two weeks’ time they would resolve as to the name(s) of the Arbitrator(s) in terms of Clause 9 of the Power Purchase Agreement. To such an extent, if required, the impugned order stands modified and the Appeal is disposed of accordingly. Chief Justice Judge Ayub
